title: Loot Beams: Relooted!
description: Adds colorful and customizable beams to your items!
body:
No Fabric. Please don't port it either, I (Amo) don't want asked about fabric issues on a forge page.

 
![Image of loot with the overhauled beams](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/981833808666054676/1152696982004047974/javaw_iJ5O9az5hs.gif)

 

A client-side mod that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!

[**__PLEASE LOOK AT THE CONFIG PRESETS LINKED HERE BEFORE ASKING WHY IT LOOKS WEIRD__**](https://github.com/shiroroku/LootBeams/tree/1.20.1/Presets)
 

Loot Beams are added to all items by default and they change colors depending on the items name. You can specify a whitelist/blacklist for Beams, color overrides, and even NBT tags to change their color! (like "lootbeams.color:"0xFFFFFF"").

 

Beams also have nametags that show up when looking at an item or crouching so you can see what an item is without even picking it up. This mod is client-side, meaning it will run on vanilla servers and forge servers that do not have this mod installed!

 

As of 17/09/23, this mod has received MAJOR changes to its customizability. For example configs, please visit here. You can change the textures and sound of this mod via a resource pack - including trail texture, particle texture, beam texture and glow texture.

 

Have any questions or need help? [Visit my Discord here.](https://discord.gg/2ZB6MKaTbx)
